title: hieracium cernagorae subsp. cernagorae
intro: Hieracium cernagorae subsp. cernagorae is a rare alpine plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically found in the Dinaric Alps of Montenegro, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Croatia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium cernagorae subsp. cernagorae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
